author: usernametooshort
title: Duplicate Exception Class Creates Silent Error Handling Gap
notes: Both parse.py and helpers.py define ImportPayloadLoadError, but cmd.py only ever calls helpers.load_import_issues_data() which raises helpers.ImportPayloadLoadError — the same type cmd.py catches. parse.load_import_issues_data() is never called anywhere in the codebase (zero references via git grep). The claimed cross-module exception mismatch is hypothetical and does not exist in any real execution path. The duplication is code smell but not a bug.
